title: Standards and Norms
desc: 42 standards, regulations and frameworks integrated into our platform to guarantee your compliance.
subDesc: GreenEcoGenius is the only B2B circular economy platform that natively integrates ISO standards, international regulations and ESG reporting frameworks into every feature.
stat3Source: Sources: ISO, GRI, GHG Protocol, B Corp, EFRAG
stat4Source: Public sources only, no proprietary data
filtersSub: Six pillars cover the full set of obligations and standards of your sustainability transition.
frameworksTitle: Built on the recognised standards of the market
frameworksSub: Every standard and framework is woven into the product, not painted on top.
labelsPreparationDesc: GreenEcoGenius helps you prepare your application to the recognised labels of the market: B Corp, GreenTech Innovation, Lucie 26000 Label, Responsible Digital Label, and EcoVadis. We are a preparation tool, not a certification body.
auditSub: A dedicated team assesses your exposure to the 42 standards in less than 48 hours and hands you a prioritised action plan.
